post_hoc_merged_series_bh_exploratory.note: Does not correct the 142-window search — exploratory only.

interpretation: After multiplicity correction over the 142-window search, 0 windows/series support a discovery claim. Global permutation p=0.0001 is a catalog-wide diagnostic (Methods); family Bonferroni-adjusted p=0.0142. Primary inference remains in-sample temporal ETAS consistency (p_ETAS=1.0).
